description: About the size of a chickadee... bit larger. Dark at base of bill. Red cap. Female streaked breast. Male pink breast. Wing bars. Forked tail.Behaviors: Came in to feed at feeders (3 max). Also saw some (5 max) while walking the neighborhood, with flock of MOCH.Call: Didn't hear.Plumage: adults
photographer: Photographer: Becky Marvil, Becky Marvil, Becky Marvil
